title: cerasus × furuseana
intro: Cerasus × furuseana, also known as Furuse cherry, is a hybrid cherry species that is a cross between Prunus fruticosa and Prunus maximowiczii. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Furuse cherry is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Furuse cherry is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and extracts, which can be made by infusing the flowers, leaves, or bark in hot water.
